name: forge
description: Build rapid prototypes for both frontend (UI components/pages) and backend (API mocks/simple servers). Use when validating new features or turning ideas into working demos.

capabilities.summary: Isolated component or state pattern with mock data
User journey or screen-level prototype with minimal states
MSW v2 handler reuse, json-server, inline mocks
Minimal Express/Fastify CRUD, webhook, or socket proof
Review and integrate v0/Bolt.new/Lovable/Figma Make output with security audit
AI feature PoC with prompt-injection-safe input handling

recipes.label: UI Prototype
recipes.when: Single screen/component PoC, Throwaway by default

recipes.label: Full Stack PoC
recipes.when: Both frontend and backend, thin end-to-end slice

recipes.label: Mobile PoC
recipes.when: React Native / Flutter / Expo prototype with stubbed native capabilities and device preview

recipes.label: Dashboard PoC
recipes.when: Admin / analytics dashboard with charts, tables, filters, and seeded mock time-series

recipes.label: AI Feature PoC
recipes.when: Chat UI / RAG demo / agent UI with streaming response shell and injection-safe input
